subcodes.first_line: O Lord, my God, my Hope, my Aspiration and my Shelter! These are the branches of the Tree of Thy mercy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا الهی و ربی و رجائی و املی و منائی ان هولاء افنان سدره رحمانیتک
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @being a source of light; guidance
